description: Contact merge profile - based on Salesforce Record Merging Runbook specifications

relatedObjects.description: Cases where this Contact is the primary contact
Tasks related to this Contact (polymorphic WhoId field)
Events related to this Contact (polymorphic WhoId field)
Account-Contact relationships (if using Contact to Multiple Accounts)

portalUser.description: Runbook: If contacts are portal users, only one user can remain. Use AdditionalInformationMap with PortalUserId.
portalUser.cliImplementation: Query User records WHERE ContactId IN (master, duplicate), select one, reassign to master, deactivate other

individual.description: Runbook: GDPR Individual records - keep most recently updated if enabled in org settings
individual.cliImplementation: Query Individual records, compare LastModifiedDate, link most recent to master

reportsTo.description: Runbook: Prevent circular hierarchy where Contact A reports to B, then merging A into B

sharedContacts.description: Runbook: Cannot merge contacts that share Account relationships (Contact to Multiple Accounts)

fieldResolution.description: Runbook rule: Master values win unless null. Preserve important contact info from duplicate.

validation.description: Comprehensive validation: permissions, circular ReportsTo, portal users, Individual records (GDPR)

performance.description: Optimizations: explicit field selection, metadata caching, parallel related record updates

runbookCompliance.soapEquivalent: merge() call with Contact masterRecord and AdditionalInformationMap for portal users
runbookCompliance.cliImplementation: sf data query + sf data update + portal user handling + sf data delete
runbookCompliance.fieldResolutionRule: Master values win unless null (Runbook default)
runbookCompliance.relatedRecordHandling: Automatic reparenting including polymorphic WhoId fields

specialCaseHandling.portalUsers: Query User records, select survivor, reassign ContactId, deactivate duplicate user
specialCaseHandling.individual: Query Individual records, keep most recent based on LastModifiedDate
specialCaseHandling.circularHierarchy: Validate ReportsToId doesn't create circular reference

runbookCompliance.runbookReference: Contacts - Using SOAP API (Merge Contacts) section

notes: Portal user handling requires additional User object queries and updates
Individual records (GDPR) require org setting check: Setup > Data Privacy > Individual
Circular hierarchy validation prevents Contact.ReportsToId loops
CampaignMember records are deduplicated automatically by Salesforce (one per Campaign)
Polymorphic WhoId fields (Task/Event) require special handling in reparenting
